Off Calendar Jul-05-2023 Continued To Sep-12-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar Jul-03-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Plaintiff SEDGEWICK CLAIMES MANAGEMENT SERVICES INC.'s MOTION TO TRANSFER.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff SEDGEWICK CLAIMES MANAGEMENT SERVICES INC.'s unopposed motion to transfer venue to Contra Costa County is granted. Plaintiff shall pay all transfer fees.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit to the court a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order is signed. (See scanned order for details)
